description.value:
Trigger: Your last action was a successful Trick Magic Item check. You add a flourish to the trick, briefly stabilizing your false connection to the item. Attempt an check of the tradition you used for Trick Magic Item. The DC is usually a standard-difficulty DC of the item's level, but the GM can assign a different DC based on the circumstances. The effect depends on the result of your check.

This doesn't let you ignore the item's normal activation cost, frequency, charges, or other usage limits.

Critical Success As Success, with a duration of 4 rounds.

Success For 3 rounds, whenever you Activate the item, you automatically succeed at the Trick Magic Item-check for that activation and don't need to spend an action to Trick the item.

Failure You can activate the item for only 1 round, so until the end of this turn. You don't spend the Focus Point for casting this spell.
